description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 14 hrs 23 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 48 mins per day across 5 projects. Most of that time was spent in Other (42%), followed by Java (30%), Markdown (13%), and TypeScript (8%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded this week.
